Name: TRIKE_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol wanted help gathering berries.
NestClueText: The nest is covered in crushed berries. Kevin was last seen near Trikes.

Name: STEGO_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol convinced Kevin that Stegosaurus spikes are fashionable.Kevin has gone looking for style advice.
NestClueText: The sand around the nest is covered in strange drawings of plates and spikes.Large herbivore tracks lead inland.Kevin was last seen near Stegos.

Name: RAPTOR_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol told Kevin that Raptors were hosting a whispering contest, and now he has gone to judge it.
NestClueText: The nest is surrounded by tiny claw marks and dramatic scribbles. Something fast dashed off through the grass. Kevin was last seen near Raptors.

Name: DODO_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol convinced Kevin that Dodos can predict the weather by flapping in circles, and he ran off to investigate.
NestClueText: Loose feathers are scattered all around the nest, and the dirt is stamped with frantic little footprints. Kevin was last seen near Dodos.

Name: ANKYLO_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol told Kevin that Ankylosaurus tails make excellent parade drums, and now he is marching along behind them.
NestClueText: The ground near the nest is covered in neat circular dents, like someone practiced drumming in the mud. Heavy tracks head toward the rocks. Kevin was last seen near Ankylos.

Name: PTERA_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol signed Kevin up for airborne snack delivery, and he has gone chasing Pteranodons.
NestClueText: The nest is littered with dropped leaves and long drag marks from something taking off in a hurry. Kevin was last seen near Pteranodons.

Name: PHIOMIA_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol promised Kevin a grand jungle concert starring Phiomias, and he hurried off before the first toot.
NestClueText: The nest is splashed with mud and there are broad round footprints pressed deep into the ground. Kevin was last seen near Phiomias.

Name: BRONTO_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol told Kevin that Brontosaurus necks are nature's best lookout towers, and he has gone climbing after a better view.
NestClueText: Broken branches and gigantic footprints surround the nest. Whatever passed by here was unbelievably tall. Kevin was last seen near Brontos.

Name: PARASAUR_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol convinced Kevin that Parasaurs are professional alarm teachers, and now he is taking honk lessons.
NestClueText: The nest is surrounded by nervous little footprints and one very dramatic trail of kicked-up dirt. Kevin was last seen near Parasaurs.

Name: DILO_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol told Kevin that Dilophosaurs offer premium feather-cleaning services, and he believed them.
NestClueText: There are little frill-shaped marks in the dirt and suspicious green splatters near the nest. Kevin was last seen near Dilos.

Name: CARBONEMYS_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol convinced Kevin that Carbonemys shells are official island taxis, and he went looking for a ride.
NestClueText: Wide dragging tracks and tiny impatient footprints lead away from the nest. Kevin was last seen near Carbonemys.

Name: CARNO_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol told Kevin that Carnos needed emotional support for their tiny arms, and he waddled off to help.
NestClueText: The nest has been scratched up by big claws, and someone drew tiny arms in the dirt. Kevin was last seen near Carnos.

Name: REX_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol appointed Kevin as a Rex roar judge, and now he is taking his clipboard duties far too seriously.
NestClueText: Huge footprints crush the ground near the nest, and a shaky note says 'very loud, probably good'. Kevin was last seen near Rexes.

Name: SARCO_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol told Kevin that Sarcos need dental inspections, and he went to check the biggest smiles on the island.
NestClueText: The nest is damp, muddy, and covered in long tail drags leading toward water. Kevin was last seen near Sarcos.

Name: SPINO_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol convinced Kevin that Spinosaurus sails are actual boats, and he left to book passage.
NestClueText: Wet footprints, fish scales, and a badly drawn sailboat are scattered around the nest. Kevin was last seen near Spinos.

Name: COMPY_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol invited Kevin to a very important Compy council, and now he is surrounded by tiny opinions.
NestClueText: The nest is covered in hundreds of tiny footprints and one feather-sized meeting agenda. Kevin was last seen near Compies.

Name: IGUANODON_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol told Kevin that Iguanodons award official thumbs-up certificates, and he went to earn one.
NestClueText: Pointy thumb marks are pressed into the mud near the nest. Kevin was last seen near Iguanodons.

Name: PACHY_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol signed Kevin up for Pachy helmet testing, and he did not ask enough questions.
NestClueText: Small round impact marks dot the ground near the nest, along with a note that says 'helmet probably optional'. Kevin was last seen near Pachys.

Name: ANKYLO_02
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol told Kevin that Ankylos are expert rock potato farmers, and he went to inspect the harvest.
NestClueText: Pebbles, dents, and suspiciously potato-shaped rocks are scattered around the nest. Kevin was last seen near Ankylos.

Name: ARGENT_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol told Kevin that Argentavis run the island postal service, and he has gone to complain about missing snacks.
NestClueText: Large feathers and deep talon marks surround the nest. Something big flew off in a hurry. Kevin was last seen near Argentavis.

Name: SABER_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol convinced Kevin that Sabertooths host official whisker-measuring competitions.
NestClueText: Soft paw prints and tiny measuring scratches mark the dirt around the nest. Kevin was last seen near Sabertooths.

Name: DIREWOLF_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol told Kevin that Direwolves were looking for a backup singer, and he went to audition.
NestClueText: Paw prints circle the nest, and someone scratched 'awoo practice' into the dirt. Kevin was last seen near Direwolves.

Name: MAMMOTH_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol told Kevin that Mammoths are walking fluffy mountains, and he left to verify this scientific claim.
NestClueText: The nest is dusted with loose fur, crushed snow, and enormous footprints. Kevin was last seen near Mammoths.

Name: BEELZEBUFO_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol convinced Kevin that Beelzebufos are royal jungle trampolines, and he went to request a bounce.
NestClueText: The nest is damp, sticky, and surrounded by strange hopping marks. Kevin was last seen near Beelzebufos.

Name: BARYONYX_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol sent Kevin to negotiate fish snacks with Baryonyx, which was probably a terrible idea.
NestClueText: Fish scales, wet claw marks, and one very nervous feather trail lead away from the nest. Kevin was last seen near Baryonyx.

Name: MEGALODON_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol told Kevin that Megalodons run a friendly underwater smile club, and he waddled toward the shore.
NestClueText: The nest contains wet sand, fish bones, and a very bad drawing of a shark wearing a smile. Kevin was last seen near Megalodons.

Name: CASTOROIDES_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol gave Kevin a tiny clipboard and sent him to inspect beaver dams.
NestClueText: Wood chips, tooth marks, and muddy webbed footprints surround the nest. Kevin was last seen near Castoroides.
